MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Bina Ghanaat of HUGO & PARKER (415-808-0300), appearing for intervenor and moving party American States Insurance Company.
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing CourtCall for plaintiff Peter Wintersteen.

RULING: SPECIALLY APPEARING AMERICAN STATES INSURANCE COMPANY'S AMENDED MOTION TO 1) SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND 2) GRANT LEAVE TO FILE AN ANSWER IN INTERVENTION
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: Specially Appearing American States Insurance Company's Amended Motion to 1) Set Aside Default and 2) Grant Leave to File An Answer in Intervention is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Specially Appearing Defendant American States Insurance Company is granted leave to file an answer-in-intervention. The motion is denied as to the setting aside of the default. The Court did not consider Plaintiff's conditional non-opposition as it was untimely filed. (C.C.P. 1005(b).) Prevailing party is to submit a proposed order in compliance with C.R.C. 3.1312. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
